## Stage Review

Stage: <!-- requirements | design | epic | tasks -->
Next stage: <!-- design | epic | tasks | execution -->
Artifact(s): <!-- list files under docs/ or .ai/tasks/ -->

## Reviewer Workflow
- Use GitHub Files Changed view to add line comments with `+` on any line.
- Request changes if edits are needed.
- Approve only when comments are resolved.

## Proceed Gate
- [ ] I confirm all blocking comments are resolved.
- [ ] I approve proceeding to the next stage.

## Automation Controls
- Add label: `stage:<current>`
- Add label: `proceed:<next>` only after approval
